import { config } from '../config'; var context = null; export function errorContext(cb) { if (config.useDeprecatedSynchronousErrorHandling) { var isRoot = !context; if (isRoot) { context = { errorThrown: false, error: null }; } cb(); if (isRoot) { var _a = context, errorThrown = _a.errorThrown, error = _a.error; context = null; if (errorThrown) { throw error; } } } else { cb(); } } export function captureError(err) { if (config.useDeprecatedSynchronousErrorHandling && context) { context.errorThrown = true; context.error = err; } } //# sourceMappingURL=errorContext.js.map
